chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ سَهَا فِي الْأَرْبَعِ وَ الْخَمْسِ وَ لَمْ يَدْرِ زَادَ أَوْ نَقَصَ أَوِ اسْتَيْقَنَ أَنَّهُ زَادَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – The one who omits in the fourth and the fifth and does not know he has exceeded or is deficient, or he is convinced that he has exceeded

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/201)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/201)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ زَادَ فِي صَلَاتِهِ فَعَلَيْهِ الْإِعَادَةُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Abdullah Bin Aamir, from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The one who increases in his Salāt, so upon him is the repeating’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn ‘Amir from Ali ibn Mahziyar from Fadalah ibn Ayyub from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from abu Basir from who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one increases something in his Salah (prayer) he performs it again.’”
